title: Reference Style Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image celestial particle transformation for football action pose reference before celestial cosmic style transformation, preserving the uploaded reference composition and fictional adult football player sprinting with the ball under stadium lights. Subject: fictional adult football player sprinting with the ball under stadium lights stays in the exact source position, pose, body proportions, and silhouette while being rebuilt from dense constellations, stardust, nebula particles, and luminous cosmic matter. Scene: Pure black infinite-space backdrop with cinematic negative space, deep-space atmospheric haze, floating star clusters, and enough emptiness to keep the original silhouette readable. Composition: Preserve the uploaded image composition, camera angle, perspective, framing, pose logic, body proportions, and object placement as the fixed image-to-image structure. Signature Elements: Billions of micro stars, glowing cosmic dust, nebula fog, celestial particle trails, galactic light streams, subtle gravitational distortions, floating star clusters, and crisp dissolving stardust edges. Style: Luxury museum-grade cosmic digital artwork with divine celestial energy, impossible scale, elegant mystery, ultra-detailed particle density, and polished vertical poster finish. Color Palette: Fixed palette of mostly white and silver starlight with soft blue-violet nebula glow and tiny gold stellar sparks. Lighting: Ethereal cosmic glow, volumetric illumination, radiant star bloom, subtle celestial aura, and ultra-high contrast against the black-space field. Restrictions: Keep one coherent transformed subject, exact source pose and composition, clean black-space focus, crisp particle detail, and a clearly recognizable silhouette.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Signature Elements: Billions of micro stars, glowing cosmic dust, nebula fog, celestial particle trails, galactic light streams, subtle gravitational distortions, floating star clusters, and crisp dissolving stardust edges. Style: Luxury museum-grade cosmic digital artwork with divine celestial energy, impossible scale, elegant mystery, ultra-detailed particle density, and polished vertical poster finish. Color Palette: Fixed palette of mostly white and silver starlight with soft blue-violet nebula glow and tiny gold stellar sparks. Lighting: Ethereal cosmic glow, volumetric illumination, radiant star bloom, subtle celestial aura, and ultra-high contrast against the black-space field. Restrictions: Keep one coherent transformed subject, exact source pose and composition, clean black-space focus, crisp particle detail, and a clearly recognizable silhouette.
